notableEvents.label: Jac Caglianone reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone reaches on a throwing error by shortstop J.P. Crawford.

notableEvents.label: Carter Jensen GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen grounds into a double play, first baseman Josh Naylor to shortstop J.P. Crawford. Salvador Perez out at 2nd. Carter Jensen out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Tolbert steals (2) 2nd base. Tyler Tolbert to 3rd. Tyler Tolbert advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Mitch Garver.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone reaches on a throwing error by shortstop J.P. Crawford.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone reaches on a throwing error by shortstop J.P. Crawford.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Bryan Woo. Michael Massey to 3rd. Kyle Isbel to 2nd. Michael Massey advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Bryan Woo.
